action.rationale: Jungle, planet, novel, and balloon are all associated with exploration.
Alien and planet relate to space exploration, rocket to spacecraft, voyage to exploration journey.
Common exploration-related words: planet, rocket, voyage, alien.
Exploration commonly involves space (planet, rocket, alien) and journeys (voyage), with jungle also being a typical exploration setting.
Stage relates to performance: artist, singer, camera (stage photography). Other possibilities: poet, writer, but lower confidence.

Connects helmet (ancient artifact), museum (displays ruins), spider (lives in ruins), spirit (haunts ruins), temple (often in ruins). Avoids red words and assassin.
